posts.title: Welcome to mummyj2Treats: Freshly Baked Happiness in Uyo
posts.body:
Welcome to mummyj2Treats, the cozy corner of the internet where your cake cravings, small chops dreams, and event-food plans finally meet their match. 
Whether you’re here for a quick parfait, a birthday cake, or full catering for a wedding in Uyo, this site was built to make ordering from “Mummy J” as simple and friendly as walking into the shop.
What You’ll Find on the Website
Browse the full menu anytime
Explore cakes, pastries, small chops, parfaits, drinks, and event packages in one place. Each item includes a clear description and price so you can plan your budget before you call or place an order.

Real-time stock & order-only items
Products are clearly marked as In Stock, Low Stock, Out of Stock, or Order Only, so you always know what’s available immediately and what needs a little extra time in the oven.

A smarter cart and checkout preview
Add items to your cart from your phone or laptop and see an instant summary of quantities, total price, and delivery threshold. You can adjust quantities, save items for later, and come back when you’re ready.

Stories, Trust, and Community
Customer Stories Wall
Our new Stories page is like a digital guest book. Real customers share how mummyj2Treats has been part of their birthdays, church events, family dinners, and late-night snack runs. Once your story is approved, it joins the wall of fame for others to see.

Share your own testimony
You can write a short review, upload a photo of your cake or treat, or even add a short video from your phone. This helps new customers see real results, and it helps us keep improving.

Behind-the-scenes Blog
From cake-decorating clips to small chops prep, Mummy J will use the Blog & Videos section to share tips, kitchen moments, and event highlights. Think of it as a friendly peek into the kitchen before your order arrives.

Designed for Your Daily Life in Uyo
Mobile-first experience
The site is designed to work beautifully on your phone: clean product cards, simple buttons, and a cart view that feels like a modern shopping app.

Clear delivery promise
You’ll always see info like “Free delivery above ₦15,000” so you know exactly when you qualify for extra perks.

Easy contact and custom orders
Need a custom cake inscription, special diet, or big event catering? Use the About & Contact page to send details; we’ll call you back to confirm.

Closing
Thank you for visiting mummyj2Treats online. This website is more than a menu – it’s a bridge between your celebrations and a kitchen that truly cares. 
Browse around, add something sweet to your cart, and if you’ve already tasted our treats, don’t forget to share your story so others can discover their new favorite bakery in Uyo.
